title: Chicken Nerf Reforged
description: Prevents random chicken egg laying. Instead, breeding chickens produces eggs.
body:
An unofficial (permitted) forge port of [Chicken Nerf](https://modrinth.com/mod/chicken-nerf).

*Chickens will no longer randomly lay eggs. Instead, when you breed two chicken (with seed like in vanilla), they will produce a random number of eggs.*

*This has several advantages:*
- *It makes more sense*
- *It makes chicken farms non-trivial*
- *It can reduce lag because wild chickens won't randomly create items all over the place*
- *It more closely matches the other animals of minecraft*

This port has basically the same behavior as the original mod, except:

- Instead of using **Maximum eggs chickens lay** to limit the maximum number of eggs a chicken can lay once, use "Number of eggs laid = (laid_eggs_count_minimum) + 0 ~ (laid_eggs_count_variation)" to calculate";
